title: AWS Added Gemma 4 Models On Amazon Bedrock
summary: AWS announced availability of Google DeepMind's Gemma 4 model family on Amazon Bedrock, including Gemma 4 31B, Gemma 4 26B-A4B, and Gemma 4 E2B in US East (N. Virginia), US East (Ohio), US West (Oregon), and Europe (Frankfurt).

evidence_refs.license_note: Official announcement reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Evaluate Bedrock access, regional availability, pricing, quotas, latency, and model behavior before routing Gemma 4 workloads through AWS.
Refresh regional allowlists, deployment docs, data-residency notes, and fallback routing for Bedrock deployments that may adopt Gemma 4.
Benchmark reasoning, multimodal input, function calling, structured output, and streaming behavior before exposing Gemma 4 through gateways, SDK defaults, or coding-agent model routes.

detail.migration_notes: This event records AWS-hosted Bedrock availability for Gemma 4. APW does not assert Google first-party API availability, exact Bedrock model IDs, account eligibility, pricing, quotas, latency, or feature parity.

limitations: The source-review candidate classified this page as a pricing change; source-owner review corrected the public event to model availability after checking the official announcement.
APW records regional availability and high-level capability facts only; exact account eligibility, model IDs, pricing, quotas, latency, and feature parity require AWS account-level verification.
The official announcement was reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose is copied into APW.
